text: The student managed to solve the complex equation after working on it for three hours.
The cat stopped flying through the kitchen every morning before breakfast.
She regretted that her team won the championship last season.
The ice cream began to melt under the hot summer sun.
He returned to his hometown after living abroad for twenty years.
The rock continued to breathe heavily after climbing the steep mountain trail.
She realized that the Earth revolves around the Sun.
The bachelor announced that his wife would be attending the ceremony.
The company stopped manufacturing typewriters and shifted to computer keyboards.
The colorless green ideas slept furiously before waking up refreshed.
